nodes.name: Kien truc nhieu lop
nodes.summary: Backend to chuc theo luong Controller -> Service -> Repository -> MongoDB, giup tach ro API, nghiep vu va luu tru.

nodes.name: Xac thuc JWT
nodes.summary: Spring Security ket hop JwtAuthenticationFilter va JwtUtil de bao ve API theo token.

nodes.name: Observer cho Task Events
nodes.summary: TaskService phat sinh domain events, TaskEventListener xu ly notification va activity log bat dong bo.

nodes.name: Strategy cap nhat trang thai Task
nodes.summary: Cac strategy xu ly tung trang thai task, factory chon strategy phu hop va abstract class giu template xu ly chung.

nodes.name: Plugin Architecture
nodes.summary: PluginLoader va HostContext cho phep mo rong bang plugin jar ben ngoai qua reflection.

layers.name: Tong quan
layers.description: Cac file goc nhu README, Maven wrapper va manifest du an.

layers.name: API Controllers
layers.description: Lop nhan request REST va anh xa endpoint HTTP.

layers.name: Business Services
layers.description: Lop xu ly nghiep vu cho user, project, task, notification, comment va activity log.

layers.name: Repositories
layers.description: Lop truy cap MongoDB thong qua Spring Data repositories.

layers.name: Entities & Data Model
layers.description: Cac entity MongoDB va enum mo ta du lieu luu tru.

layers.name: DTOs
layers.description: Cac object dung de trao doi request/response giua frontend va backend.

layers.name: Security
layers.description: Cau hinh Spring Security, JWT filter va tien ich token.

layers.name: Configuration
layers.description: Cau hinh Web MVC, WebSocket, CORS va application.yml.

layers.name: Events & Listeners
layers.description: Observer pattern cho task events, notification va activity log bat dong bo.

layers.name: Design Patterns & Plugins
layers.description: Factory, Strategy, Template Method va he plugin mo rong.

layers.name: Utilities
layers.description: Tien ich dung chung cua backend.

layers.name: Tests
layers.description: Cac test khoi dong va kiem thu nen tang.

tour.title: Diem vao ung dung
tour.description: Bat dau tu Ct240Application, pom.xml va application.yml de hieu runtime Spring Boot.

tour.title: Luong API
tour.description: Cac controller expose REST endpoint cho auth, user, project, task, comment, notification va activity log.

tour.title: Nghiep vu chinh
tour.description: Service layer xu ly logic quan ly du an, task, comment, notification va user.

tour.title: Du lieu va MongoDB
tour.description: Entity va repository mo ta du lieu luu trong MongoDB va cach truy xuat.

tour.title: Bao mat va pattern
tour.description: JWT, Observer, Strategy, Factory, Template Method va plugin architecture la cac diem quan trong cua thiet ke.
